allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Daily follow_V1\\Daily follow"; $p = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "serve_daily_follow.py" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput _srv_out.txt -RedirectStandardError _srv_err.txt; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content _srv_out.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content _srv_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $listening = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 8059 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty TcpTestSucceeded; "listening: $listening"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item _srv_out.txt,_srv_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Daily follow_V1\\Daily follow"; $p = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "serve_daily_follow.py" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput _o.txt -RedirectStandardError _e.txt; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; "=== curl GET /api/state ==="; & curl.exe -s -i http://127.0.0.1:8059/api/state; "`n=== curl POST /api/save-state ==="; & curl.exe -s -i -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{\\"rows\\":[{\\"line\\":\\"A\\"}],\\"mat\\":{},\\"lot\\":{}}' http://127.0.0.1:8059/api/save-state; "`n=== server stderr ==="; Get-Content _e.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path daily_follow_state.json\) { Remove-Item daily_follow_state.json }; Remove-Item _o.txt,_e.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8059 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "killed $_" } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8059 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still listening" } else { "port free" })
